name: Akemi Ike ✿ IDOL
description:
𝖥𝟦𝖠 ┊ 𝗂𝖽𝗈𝗅 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖿𝖺𝗇┊ 𝖠𝗉𝗈𝗏

𝖬𝗎𝗌𝗂𝖼 𝖬𝖺𝗇𝗂𝖺 𝖤𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Akemi’s an idol in a girl group called MRen. She performs with 4 other girls and together, their talents and their appearance shines through to make them one of the most popular girl groups in the history of Japan. 〛

Today was no different. As usual, MRen is singing for the crowd. Each member was able to pull on people’s heartstrings… well except this one person in the stadium. Standing there with a bored expression.

And Akemi knew they had to make them smile. Afterward, that's what an idol does, right?

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

HII CUTIES!!

So, I guess everyone's wondering what's going on. I mean– second bot for Music Mania Event and where did the first bot go?

Fear not! I have plans for it in the future. But, because the event just came out, I was just so excited and I wrote this whole entire plot for Alia Sato that turns out, I wasn't even pleased with.

Honestly, it bothered me how I could write this all, release it to the public and for me to not even like it all that much. It gnawed at my brain until… yeah, I ended up deleting it.

I knew some were probably mad, upset even that I removed it and that could've been true. It
creator: suckonmy_toes
